raw_response: The Acer Swift Go 14 is a budget-friendly option for students looking to balance cost and performance. At $699, it fits your price range comfortably. It offers a solid 14-inch IPS display, 16GB RAM, and a powerful AMD Ryzen 5 processor, making it suitable for handling documents, spreadsheets, and web browsing. While the display is somewhat dim and it flexes under pressure, its lightweight design and long battery life make it portable and convenient for daily use.
